Home.title: Vancoillie Group
Home.description: Vancoillie Group is a family of digital companies creating solutions that simplify, connect and empower people and businesses worldwide.

DetailPage.process_title: From first conversation to a solution that keeps working.

discover.title: Understand
discover.text: We listen to your context, users and goals before making any decisions.

define.title: Set direction
define.text: We turn insights into a clear plan, realistic priorities and a shared picture.

build.title: Make & test
build.text: We work in clear steps, share progress and test what we build early.

evolve.title: Keep growing
evolve.text: After launch, we keep measuring, refining and building where it makes the biggest difference.

products.overview: From the first idea to a product used every day, we bring strategy, UX and technology together in one clear journey.
products.headline: Digital products with real value.
products.focus1: We validate your idea and translate it into a product strategy with clear priorities.
products.focus2: We design intuitive user experiences people understand right away.
products.focus3: We build to scale, measure what works, and keep improving together after every release.
products.outcome1_text: A sharp concept prevents time and budget being spent on features nobody needs.
products.outcome2_text: A logical experience lowers barriers and makes your product feel natural to use.
products.outcome3_text: We build a product foundation that can handle new insights, users and ambition.

software.overview: Custom software should make processes simpler, not more complex. That is why we start with the way you work and build exactly what is needed.
software.headline: Software that grows with your business.
software.focus1: We analyse processes and identify opportunities for automation and efficiency.
software.focus2: We develop reliable applications with attention to security, integrations and performance.
software.focus3: We create a maintainable codebase and a practical plan for future growth.
software.image_alt: Digital task flow on a smartphone
software.outcomes_title: Less manual work. More space for what matters.
software.outcome1_text: Custom software supports how your team really works instead of creating workarounds.
software.outcome2_text: We connect the right systems and data so information no longer stays fragmented.
software.outcome3_text: A clear technical foundation keeps your business adaptable as it changes.

it.overview: A strong IT environment gives your team peace of mind and continuity. We keep your infrastructure secure, organised and available.
it.headline: IT that works quietly in the background.
it.focus1: We bring devices, networks, cloud and security together in one manageable environment.
it.focus2: We provide practical support, remotely or on site, whenever you need it.
it.focus3: We proactively monitor your environment so problems are prevented before they disrupt your work.
it.image_alt: Vancoillie IT Hulp portal with support requests
it.outcomes_title: An environment your team can rely on.
it.outcome1_text: Clear support and proactive management keep your team productive when it matters.
it.outcome2_text: From device to network, you get help without searching for the right specialist.
it.outcome3_text: We make your IT landscape understandable, manageable and aligned with your daily needs.

security.overview: Cybersecurity is not a standalone product, but a consistent layer across technology, processes and daily habits.
security.headline: Protection built in from the start.
security.focus1: We make risks visible and decide together which security measures make the biggest difference.
security.focus2: We strengthen access, devices, data and networks with practical controls that fit your organisation.
security.focus3: We help teams work safely with clear agreements and continuous attention to change.
security.outcome1_text: We help you focus on the vulnerabilities that truly matter to your organisation.
security.outcome2_title: Peace of mind in daily work
security.outcome2_text: Practical security protects you without making processes unnecessarily complex.
security.outcome3_text: Technology is only truly secure when people know what they can do and why.

data.overview: Good decisions start with reliable information. We make data usable, understandable and relevant to your daily operations.
data.headline: From data to direction.
data.focus1: We structure the right data around the questions that truly matter to your organisation.
data.focus2: We make insights visible through clear dashboards and reporting.
data.focus3: We translate patterns into concrete opportunities for growth, optimisation and better decisions.
data.image_alt: Financial overview in a mobile app
data.outcome1_text: We bring scattered data together so you no longer decide on gut feel or isolated exports.
data.outcome2_text: Clear dashboards make the right information accessible at the moment you need it.
data.outcome3_text: We turn figures into patterns, opportunities and questions that move your team forward.

design.overview: Strong design builds trust and makes complex things simple. We create experiences that feel logical and strengthen your brand.
design.headline: Experiences that feel clear and human.
design.focus1: We translate your brand, audiences and ambition into a clear creative direction.
design.focus2: We develop interfaces and interactions with accessibility and ease of use in mind.
design.focus3: We safeguard every detail so identity, content and technology form one whole.
design.outcomes_title: An experience that delivers on your brand.
design.outcome1_text: A consistent visual language makes your offer feel credible from the first interaction.
design.outcome2_text: We structure content and interaction so visitors understand what they can do sooner.
design.outcome3_text: Every detail contributes to a brand experience that feels distinctive and coherent.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: Vancoillie Group handles personal data with care and uses it only when needed to get in touch or improve our services.
privacy.section_content: If you have questions about your data or want to submit a request, please contact us through the contact page.

terms.title: Terms & Conditions
terms.intro: This page outlines the general principles for using the Vancoillie Group website and services.
terms.section_content: For questions about a collaboration, quote, or applicable terms, please contact us directly.

Hero.description: Vancoillie Group is a family of digital companies creating solutions that simplify, connect and empower people and businesses worldwide.

Companies.introduction: Vancoillie Group brings together companies that help organizations work smarter, grow faster, and stay secure. From IT support and infrastructure to custom software, websites, apps, and digital platforms — we combine personal service with scalable innovation.
Companies.identity: Belgium-rooted and internationally ambitious, we build lasting partnerships through trust, craftsmanship, and long-term thinking. Our teams take ownership and deliver solutions that create real, measurable value.

it.name: Vancoillie IT Hulp
it.description: Personal IT support for individuals and businesses. We solve problems, strengthen your infrastructure, and keep you moving forward.

studio.name: Vancoillie Studio
studio.description: We design and build digital products that look great, work seamlessly, and drive results — websites, apps, platforms, and custom software.

SelectedWork.intro: From digital products to IT solutions, we build with precision and care. Here are some recent projects we’ve partnered on.

abbobuddy.label: DIGITAL PRODUCT
abbobuddy.title: AbboBuddy
abbobuddy.description: A smart and simple way to manage all your subscriptions in one place.
abbobuddy.image_alt: AbboBuddy subscription app displayed on a smartphone

website.label: WEBSITES BY VANCOILLIE STUDIO
website.title: A website that works for you.
website.description: Vancoillie Studio designs and builds fast, professional websites that strengthen your brand and turn visitors into customers.
website.image_alt: A professional website by Vancoillie Studio displayed on a laptop

news.label: CONSUMER APP
news.title: Vancoillie News
news.description: Technology news, updates, and insights brought together in one clear mobile experience.
news.image_alt: Vancoillie News app displayed on a smartphone

Capabilities.intro: We combine strategy, design and technology to build digital products and IT solutions that drive results and stand the test of time.

products.title: Digital Products
products.description: We design and build intuitive digital products and platforms that people love to use.

software.title: Software Development
software.description: Scalable, secure and robust software solutions tailored to your business.

it.title: IT Solutions
it.description: Infrastructure, cloud and workplace solutions that keep your business running.

security.title: Cybersecurity
security.description: We protect what matters. Security by design across systems, data and people.

data.title: Data & Analytics
data.description: Turning data into insight so you can make smarter decisions, faster.

design.title: Design & Experience
design.description: User-centered design that brings clarity, emotion and excellence to every detail.

approach.intro: We follow a proven process that puts your goals at the center. From discovery to delivery and beyond, we’re with you every step of the way.

discover.title: Discover
discover.description: We dive deep to understand your challenges, goals and opportunities.

define.title: Define
define.description: We translate insights into a clear strategy and actionable plan.

design.title: Design
design.description: We craft seamless experiences and solid architectures.

build.title: Build
build.description: We develop with precision, quality and scalability in mind.

deliver.title: Deliver & Support
deliver.description: We launch, optimize and support so you can keep moving forward.

Vision.intro: We believe technology has the power to simplify, connect and empower. Our vision is to create solutions that drive progress for people, businesses and society.
Vision.image_alt: Modern concrete staircase illuminated by sunlight
Vision.quote: Our goal is simple: to create technology that makes a difference and lasts.

people.title: People first
people.description: We start with real people and real needs. Everything we build must create meaningful impact.

longterm.title: Long-term thinking
longterm.description: We build with longevity in mind. Quality, sustainability and responsibility guide our decisions.

excellence.title: Excellence in execution
excellence.description: Great ideas need flawless execution. We focus on precision, reliability and continuous improvement.

together.title: Stronger together
together.description: Collaboration is in our DNA. We grow through trust, transparency and shared ambition.

integrity.title: Integrity
integrity.description: We do what’s right, even when no one is watching.

accountability.title: Accountability
accountability.description: We take ownership and deliver on our promises.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: We challenge the status quo and turn ideas into value.

respect.title: Respect
respect.description: We value each other and embrace diverse perspectives.

impact.title: Impact
impact.description: We measure success by the positive change we create.

Global.intro: We work with clients and partners around the world. Different markets, the same commitment to quality, trust and long-term value.

reach.title: International reach
reach.description: Projects and partnerships across multiple countries.

partnerships.title: Trusted partnerships
partnerships.description: We build strong relationships based on trust and results.

growth.title: Sustainable growth
growth.description: Expanding our impact while staying true to our values.

Global.quote: Technology should remove barriers, strengthen connections, and give people the space to excel. That is what drives us.

Final.intro: Whether you have a clear plan or just an idea, we’re here to help you move forward. Let’s create something meaningful together.
Final.connect_intro: Choose the way that works best for you.

meeting.title: Schedule a meeting
meeting.value: Pick a time that suits you

Final.brand_description: A family of digital companies building technology that moves people forward.
